description: VMProbeTargets defines a set of static and dynamically discovered targets for the prober.

ingress.description: Ingress defines the set of dynamically discovered Ingress objects which hosts are considered for probing.

kubernetes.description: Kubernetes defines kubernetes targets, which are considered for probing.

static.description: Static defines static targets which are considers for probing.

staticConfig.description: StaticConfig defines static targets which are considers for probing.
